items.title: Whoever Replaces Tim Cook at Apple Will Have 'Big Shoes to Fill'
items.description: Apple's market cap went from $400 million to $4 trillion during Cook's 14-years as CEO, JPMorgan said.

items.title: Top 50 High-Quality Dividend Growth Stocks For December 2025

items.title: Apple's chip chief reportedly 'not leaving': A closer look
items.description: Amid a flurry of executive departures from Apple (AAPL), Apple's chip chief Johny Srouji reportedly said on Monday that he is "not leaving" the company "anytime soon." Creative Strategies principal analyst and CEO, Ben Bajarin, joins Market Domination host Josh Lipton to discuss the reports and how consequential these executive departures could be for Apple and investors. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Trump approves Nvidia H200 chips for sale to China
items.description: The Trump administration will allow Nvidia to begin shipping its H200 chip to China.

items.title: ICEBlock developer sues U.S. government after DOJ demanded Apple remove app from store
items.description: The developer of the ICEBlock app sued the U.S. government for alleged free speech infringements.
